action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline AUC 0.7558 with 10 epochs. ~1.5s/epoch. Loss still declining. Analysis: Model is underfitting. Need more epochs and potentially better architecture. Decision: Train for 50 epochs with improved hyperparameters (larger hidden dim, learning rate warmup). Also try a Transformer-based SAKT model.
